embeds.title: Keystone Departments
embeds.description:
Select your department using the dropdown menu below to gain access to the server invite.
Having trouble within departments? Feel free to contact us in <#1442225117341024311>.

fields.name: <:cad:1486838867771523244> Communication & CAD Protocols
fields.value:
Our server relies strictly on Discord Voice Channels (VCs) for all active communication. The CAD system is utilized exclusively for:
``-`` Getting dispatched to active calls.
``-`` Real-time call and incident management.
``-`` Sharing bodycam footage (Whitelisted personnel only).

fields.name: Whitelist Information
fields.value:
Once you are whitelisted, you will receive the <@&1461451245515440160> role. This role grants you whitelisted permissions, allowing the use of whitelisted in-game accessories such as the grappler, undercover features, and other restricted equipment.

*Please note that the <@&1461466481043968052> reserves the right to modify, add, or remove regulations at any time without prior notice.*

fields.name: Open Positions
fields.value:
As of 03/29/2026 (mm/dd/y) we are actively looking for the following department positions:
``-`` **Head of Emergency Communications**
``-`` **Head of Department of Justice**
